0.0.33.en:
Fix cleaning mode swap on L20 Ultra and similar combo-dock devices

- Fixed: 'Set cleaning mode to Sweeping & Mopping' was setting the robot to Sweeping, and vice versa
- Fixed: 'Start cleaning' flow card not applying the correct cleaning mode
- Root cause: mop pad lifting detection had a chicken-and-egg problem where it never activated if the device was in Sweeping & Mopping or Mopping mode
- Detection now triggers reliably on first property update from any combo-dock device

0.0.28.en:
Multi-floor and zone trigger fixes
- Fixed: multi-room autocomplete now shows rooms from all floors (was single floor only)
- Fixed: 'Zone cleaning finished' trigger now fires correctly (was missed due to state transitions ZONE_CLEANING→RETURNING→CHARGING)
- Fixed: settings map falling back to floor 1 after a few seconds when viewing floor 2 (periodic refresh now respects selected floor)
- Fixed: map rotation re-applied after periodic map refreshes

0.0.27.en:
Multi-floor UX improvements, zone-specific triggers, map rotation in settings
- Room autocomplete in action cards now shows rooms from ALL floors with floor labels
- Floor selection in app settings persists across page visits
- Map rotation dropdown added to app settings (0°/90°/180°/270°)
- Zone cleaning finished trigger now includes zone name token and optional zone filter
- Users can create flows like 'When Zone X is finished → Pause'
- Zone name tracked from flow card through to completion trigger

0.0.26.en:
Dreame shortcuts support
- New 'Run a shortcut' Flow card to trigger shortcuts configured in the Dreame Home app
- Shortcuts auto-discovered from device (property 4-48) with base64 name decoding
- Autocomplete lists all available shortcuts by name

0.0.25.en:
Multi-floor and zone rewrite, map rotation, bug fixes

Architecture Rewrite:
- New per-floor data model (savedMaps) replacing scattered state — each floor has independent rooms, zones, and map data
- Rooms now correctly switch when changing floors (was always showing floor 1)
- Zones stored per-floor inside savedMaps — persist across restarts
- Migration from old data format on first load

Bug Fixes:
- Fixed: rooms always showing floor 1 regardless of selected floor
- Fixed: zones disappearing after app restart
- Fixed: zone deletion not working (X button)
- Fixed: zone drawing not releasing on web browsers (mouseup outside canvas)
- Fixed: map showing wrong floor due to string/number type mismatch
- Fixed: floor list not refreshing in settings UI
- Added keyboard support for zone drawing (Enter to save, Escape to cancel)

New Features:
- Map rotation setting in widget (0°, 90°, 180°, 270°)
- Per-floor room list in app settings (rooms update when switching floors)
- Zones filtered by current floor in settings
- Diagnostic logging for zone CRUD operations

0.0.24.en:
Multi-floor support, zone cleaning, map color schemes, and new triggers

Multi-Floor Support:
- Automatic detection of multi-floor/multi-map setups via Dreame cloud
- Floor selector in App Settings and map widget to view different floors
- 'Select floor' Flow card to switch floors before cleaning
- 'Current Floor' device capability shows active floor
- Room autocomplete shows rooms from all floors with floor labels
- Floor data persists across app restarts

Zone Cleaning:
- Visual zone editor in App Settings — draw rectangles on the map to define cleaning zones
- Zones stored per device and per floor with pixel-to-device coordinate conversion
- 'Clean a zone' Flow card with autocomplete from saved zones
- 'Zone cleaning finished' trigger card
- Full CRUD: create, view, and delete zones from the settings page

Map Widget Improvements:
- 5 color schemes: Dreame Light, Dreame Dark, Mijia Light, Mijia Dark, Grayscale
- Configurable room label size: Small, Medium (default), Large, XXL
- Floor selector for multi-floor devices
- Dark theme support with adapted text and icon colors

New Flow Cards:
- 'Cleaning finished' trigger — fires when any cleaning task completes (includes cleaned area and time tokens)
- 'Zone cleaning finished' trigger
- 'Clean a zone' action with zone autocomplete
- 'Select floor' action with floor autocomplete

Fixes:
- Fixed cleaning_finished trigger reading state after update instead of before
- Fixed floor names showing as garbled text (base64 decode for plain-text names)
- Fixed MAP_LIST property using wrong PIID (was 39, corrected to 8 per Tasshack)
- Fixed MULTI_FLOOR_MAP property using wrong PIID (added 6-7)
- Multi-floor state persists across restarts (no more flickering)

0.0.23.en:
Robot position fix, Australia region, and Sentry stability
- Fixed: robot blue dot showing in wrong position when opening map widget (was reading stale saved-map data)
- Added Australia, Russia to region selector (Australia uses EU server)
- Removed broken Germany region option (no dedicated Dreame server)
- Fixed Sentry crash on Homey containers (disabled incompatible memory context gathering)

0.0.22.en:
Multi-device MQTT fix, room cleaning improvements, and better error reporting
- Fixed: second vacuum not receiving real-time updates (MQTT connection was shared incorrectly)
- Single MQTT connection now properly serves multiple devices with per-device topic subscriptions
- New simple room cleaning flow cards: 'Clean a room' and 'Clean multiple rooms' that use the vacuum's current settings
- Increased room label font size and contrast on map widget and settings page for better readability
- Replaced legacy Sentry SDK with modern @sentry/node for proper error severity levels
- Map download now retries on expired tokens and includes detailed error info
- Consolidated diagnostic logging through a single path

0.0.1.en:
Initial release
- Control robot vacuums via Dreame Home cloud API
- Cleaning modes: Sweeping, Mopping, Sweeping & Mopping
- Suction level, water volume, and cleaning route control
- CleanGenius intelligent cleaning with auto-start
- Dock features: Auto Empty, Self Clean, Drying
- Consumable monitoring with low alerts
- Battery, cleaned area, cleaning time sensors
- Flow cards for automations
- Configurable polling interval

0.0.2.en:
New capabilities, flow cards, and bug fixes

**New capabilities:**
- Carpet Boost, Sensitivity, and Cleaning mode
- Dock settings: Mop Wash Level, Water Temperature, Auto Empty Frequency, Mop Pressure, Drying Time,

0.0.3.en:
MQTT, room discovery, map widget, and settings page
- Real-time MQTT connection to Dreame cloud for instant state updates
- Automatic room discovery via MQTT and cloud map download
- Dashboard widget: vacuum map with room colors, labels, robot & charger position
- App settings page with map, status, rooms, and consumable overview
- Per-room trigger cards (cleaning started/finished) with autocomplete
- Room cleaning flow cards (single and multi-room)
- Improved map rendering based on Tasshack reference
- Reduced log noise

0.0.4.en:
MQTT-driven updates and adaptive polling
- All property updates now handled via MQTT push (instant instead of 5s delay)
- Adaptive polling: 60s idle / 15s cleaning when MQTT connected, 5s fallback when disconnected
- MQTT health monitoring with automatic fast-poll fallback if connection stalls
- Exponential backoff for MQTT reconnection (10s to 5min)
- ~80% reduction in cloud API calls when MQTT is connected

0.0.5.en:
MQTT stability and crash fixes
- Fix crash caused by unhandled MQTT errors (ECONNRESET, auth timeout, keepalive timeout)
- Use connectAsync for reliable connection establishment
- Automatic token refresh on MQTT auth errors
- Full MQTT restart after 30 minutes when reconnection fails
- HTTP fallback for map/room data when MQTT is unavailable
- Per-device listener management (no more listener leaks on reconnect)
- Room autocomplete shows helpful message when rooms are not yet discovered
- Max 10 reconnect attempts with exponential backoff before falling back to HTTP-only

0.0.6.en:
MQTT improvements and diagnostic logging
- Proactive token refresh prevents MQTT auth failures before they happen
- MQTT topic fix for broader model compatibility
- Use API-returned region for correct MQTT broker routing
- Progressive retry backoff on API requests
- Increased map download timeout for large maps
- Optional diagnostic logging via Sentry (disabled by default, enable in app settings)
- Reduced log noise in production

0.0.7.en: added optional debug setting so the developer can collect MQTT errors to debug

0.0.9.en:
Manual room ID flow cards and improved diagnostics
- New flow cards to clean rooms by ID as alternative to autocomplete (single room, multi-room, triggers, condition)
- Useful when room auto-discovery has not completed yet
- Improved map/room discovery diagnostic logging for troubleshooting
- Sentry extras now correctly included in diagnostic events
- Automatic HTTP fallback when MQTT map response times out
- Removed Dutch (NL) translations to reduce translation burden and improve dev speed
- Region selector in pairing screen (select your Dreame Home region + login in one step)
- Sentry diagnostic logging for pairing and device discovery errors

0.0.12.en: additional debug logs for fixing compatibility with L20

0.0.13.en: map view decoding with encryption key for L20 ultra

0.0.15.en: fix proper decryption of maps for some models (incl L20 ultra)

0.0.19.en:
Live tracking, current room status, dock status fixes
- Live robot position on map widget and settings page during cleaning
- Current room capability shows which room the robot is in (live during cleaning, dock room when charging)
- Fixed water tank, dirty water tank, dust bag status using correct SIID/PIID mapping
- Dock-specific properties (SIID 27) properly probed and auto-removed when unsupported
- Fixed current room detection using stored full map instead of sparse P-frame pixels
- Cached rism pixel data for fast room lookups on every P-frame (~3s)
- Localized room type names (NL/DE/FR) for room discovery

0.0.20.en:
Consumables widget and robot position fix
- New Vacuum Consumables dashboard widget with color-coded health bars
- Fixed robot position (blue dot) snapping to dock when not cleaning instead of showing incorrect position
- Added missing robot position handler for map widget live tracking
- Community forum link added to App Store listing

0.0.35.en:
Clean rebuild from v0.0.30 + all bug fixes (no multi-floor)

**Bug fixes:**
- Fixed cleaning mode swap on L20 Ultra and combo-dock devices (mopPadLifting detection from any grouped value)
- Fixed zone cleaning finished trigger never firing (STATUS=19 detection)
- Fixed app crash from duplicate code introduced by merge (v0.0.31-v0.0.34)
- Removed multi-floor code that was accidentally reintroduced via merge

**New features:**
- Waypoint navigation: click on map to place waypoints, navigate via flow cards
- Waypoint reached trigger card
- Pause vacuum and Stop vacuum flow action cards
- Zone and waypoint cards have 'After cleaning' option: Return to dock (default) or Stop in place
- Zone/waypoint triggers fire early (before robot docks) so flow actions can react

**Improvements:**
- Diagnostic logging visible with homey app run --remote
- Probe version bumped to force re-detection on upgrade

0.0.30.en:
Critical bug fix: cleaning modes, zone cleaning, shortcuts, and more

**Bug fixes:**
- Fixed sweeping/mopping modes being swapped on combo-dock robots (L20 Ultra, X40 Ultra, and similar). Sweeping now correctly vacuums, Sweeping & Mopping correctly does both.
- Auto-detection of mop pad lifting capability for correct mode mapping per device
- Cleaning finished trigger now fires when robot reaches the dock (not mid-return), so Then-cards in flows work reliably

**New features:**
- Zone cleaning: draw custom zones on the map in app settings, clean them via flow cards
- Zone cleaning finished trigger with optional zone name filter
- Simple room cleaning cards (use current device settings without specifying suction/water)
- Dreame shortcuts: run shortcuts configured in the Dreame Home app via flow cards
- Widget color schemes: Dreame Light/Dark, Mijia Light/Dark, Grayscale
- Configurable map label size in widget settings (S/M/L/XXL)
- Redesigned settings page with native Homey styling

**Under the hood:**
- Replaced @sentry/node (43MB) with lightweight SentryLite (3KB) — 80% app size reduction
- Replaced node-fetch with native Node 18 fetch
- Grouped mode mask fix aligned with Tasshack reference implementation

**Removed (for now):**
- Multi-floor support has been removed to improve stability and reduce complexity. It was the source of most regressions in test versions 0.0.24-0.0.29. We plan to re-implement it properly in a future release.
- Map rotation has been removed for the same reason.

0.0.37.en:
Remove Sentry remote logging

- Removed SentryLite and all remote diagnostic logging
- All diagnostics now go to local Homey log (visible via homey app run --remote)
- Removed diagnostics toggle from app settings (no longer needed)
- Smaller app footprint, no external dependencies for logging

0.0.38.en:
Cleaning mode per room, multi-device widget fix, error code overhaul

**New features:**
- Room cleaning flow card now has a 'Cleaning mode' dropdown: Sweeping, Mopping, Sweeping & Mopping, Vacuum then Mop, or Current setting (default). Lets you vacuum a room without mopping.

**Bug fixes:**
- Fixed: multi-device users (e.g. 2 Dreame vacuums) always saw the first device's map and consumables in both widgets. Widgets now correctly show the selected device.
- Fixed: error codes completely realigned with Tasshack/Dreame firmware. Previous mapping was wrong — e.g. error 8 was shown as 'Robot stuck' but actually means 'Dust bin not installed'. Stuck codes are now 80-99, 200. Bin full codes are 11, 101, 104, 121.
